header.title: Avatar
header.subtitle: Circular user representation with image support and automatic initials fallback. Available in five sizes.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: An avatar is a circular container that renders an image when available, or falls back to initials derived from the alt or fallback prop.

parts.container: Circular clip container. Controls size, background, and overflow.
parts.image: The element. Rendered when src is provided and loads without error.
parts.fallback: Initials text. Shown when src is absent or the image fails to load.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Five size presets from xs (24px) to xl (64px). Use md for most contexts, xl for profile headers.

fallback.title: Fallback behavior
fallback.description: When no src is provided or the image fails to load, initials are derived from the alt prop (first letter of each word, max 2 chars). Override with the fallback prop.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native <div> attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

props.src: Image URL. When omitted or the image fails to load, the fallback is shown.
props.alt: Alt text for the image. Also used to derive initials when no fallback is provided.
props.fallback: Custom initials shown when no image is available. Overrides auto-derived initials.
props.size: Size preset. One of: xs (24px), sm (32px), md (36px, default), lg (44px), xl (64px).
